category_sources: Official radvd homepage says it sends IPv6 Router Advertisement messages for stateless autoconfiguration.
source_facts.description says IPv6 Router Advertisement Daemon.
display_name_sources: Official homepage title is radvd: IPv6 Router Advertisement Daemon.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official radvd site and includes development, download, and project information.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/radvd-project/radvd; per instruction, repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official radvd homepage describes Router Advertisement messages and IPv6 stateless autoconfiguration.
source_facts.description identifies an IPv6 Router Advertisement Daemon.
